title: Hutt Expeditionary Force
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Hutt_Expeditionary_Force_2.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Two members of the Hutt Expeditionary Force.]]
The '''Hutt Expeditionary Force''' was an armed force of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidics]] sent to the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Led by the Sullustan [[Osae Meilea]], their mission was to salvage debris of the destroyed [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] that was scattered across the moon's forests. Some of the salvaged technology was later sold to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

The Expeditionary Force used force of arms to shut down rivaling salvage operations. On one occasion a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] was paid to capture a [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] freighter, ''[[Lupus Maroo]]'', that had tried to leave the moon carrying Death Star salvage.

==Appearances==
